title: Ordinance Approving the Sangguniang Kabataan Supplemental Budget No. 1 of Barangay Lalakay, Los Baños, Laguna in the Amount of One Hundred Seventy Six Thousand Three Hundred Thirty Six Pesos and 60/100 Only (php 176,336.60) for Fiscal Year 2020.
